description_long: This kiosk features a segmented, angular structure with multiple connected panels forming a partial enclosure. The exterior is predominantly black, with the interior panels displaying a vibrant cityscape at night, likely representing a skyline with illuminated skyscrapers. The kiosk appears to be constructed from solid, flat panels, possibly metal or composite, with a smooth, hard finish. There are no visible windows, but the open side suggests an accessible entryway for customers or staff. The roof is flat and unadorned, matching the minimalist, modern aesthetic of the overall design. The kiosk is compact and likely intended for temporary or semi-permanent installation in urban environments such as plazas or sidewalks.
description: A modern, angular kiosk with black exterior panels and an interior cityscape mural, featuring a flat roof and open entryway.
description_view_0: The front and angled panels display a vivid cityscape mural, with the open entryway clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view shows the solid black exterior panels and the depth of the kiosk, with the mural partially visible inside.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a mostly solid black surface with no mural or openings, emphasizing the kiosk's enclosure.
description_view_3: The opposite angled view highlights the open entryway and the continuation of the cityscape mural on the interior panels.
attribute_signage_type: printed mural on interior panels depicting a city skyline; no visible text or logos
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway on front angled panel
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, solid panels, no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with urban graphic elements
